title: Introduction and Background
objective: Establish the research context for automated literature review systems and their role in accelerating knowledge synthesis

title: Methodological Approaches
objective: Compare the technical architectures including RAG-based, NLP pipeline, and hybrid RAG+NLP methods used across systems

title: Performance Metrics and Reporting Heterogeneity
objective: Analyze metric usage (ROUGE-L, F1, precision, AUC) across studies and identify inconsistencies affecting cross-study comparison

title: Evaluation Scope and Cross-Lingual Generalization
objective: Examine the linguistic and dataset coverage of current systems, highlighting English-language dominance and untested cross-lingual generalization

title: Evidence Grounding and Claim Verification
objective: Evaluate how systems anchor their performance claims in verifiable evidence chains and assess the reliability of stated limitations

title: Open Challenges and Future Directions
objective: Synthesize the identified research gaps and propose priorities for advancing reproducible and globally applicable literature review automation
